prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: He Knows I Bake at Midnight
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Mother Was Right All Along
Tagline: Inspired by something, probably.
Theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.
Omen: a lake bell ringing without wind
Relationship dynamic: overbearing mother tension
Props: ceramic owl, scarf with impossible timing, blood-adjacent tea towel

Cast:
- Tess Bell | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=regional marketing executive | threat_aura=0.32 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family
- Sienna Hawthorne | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=hardware store owner | threat_aura=0.51 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=still has access to a property he does not own
- Daniel Lark | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=salon owner | threat_aura=0.35 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=knows about a half sibling no one asked for; once hid a casserole dish containing evidence
- Wyatt Winterson | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=gallery owner | threat_aura=0.78 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=had brunch with someone officially deceased
- Luke Bell | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=family practice physician | threat_aura=0.34 | space=annex room described as retreat supplies | secrets=covered for someone out of shame; still has access to a property he does not own
- Claire Vale | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=substitute teacher | threat_aura=0.41 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it
- Elias Sutton | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Sienna Pike | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Sienna Hawthorne is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Tess Bell says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Bellweather.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Sienna?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Elias. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Tess. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The ceramic owl is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Wyatt."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
